title: Carolinea nitida
intro:
I couldn't find any information about a plant called Carolinea nitida. It is possible that this plant is not well-documented or is a misspelling of a different plant's name. 

However, if you're referring to Carolinea nitida as a misspelling of Carolinea nitida, a synonym for Carolinea nitida  (also known as Carallia) is actually Carallia carlandi,  but this also might not be correct.
